mapper.insert: INSERT INTO new_person_access_record (device_id, major_type, minor_type, employee_no, card_no, name, event_type, event_message, capture_time, photo_url, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{majorType}, #{minorType}, #{employeeNo}, #{cardNo}, #{name}, #{eventType}, #{eventMessage}, #{captureTime}, #{photoUrl}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE new_person_access_record SET device_id = #{deviceId}, major_type = #{majorType}, minor_type = #{minorType}, employee_no = #{employeeNo}, card_no = #{cardNo}, name = #{name}, event_type = #{eventType}, event_message = #{eventMessage}, capture_time = #{captureTime}, photo_url = #{photoUrl}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
